---
title: ""
title-block-banner: false
page-layout: full
toc: false
format:
  html:
    title-block-style: none
---

::: {.eg-page}

::: {.eg-hero .eg-hero-tint-dark .eg-hero-left .eg-hero-middle style="--eg-hero-img:url('images/bannerNew.jpg');"}
::: {.eg-wrap}

## Beyond Estimates: [Rigorous Landscape Intelligence]{.colored-text}.

::: {.eg-lede}
We bridge the gap between ecological claims and verifiable reality. Using satellite data, advanced modeling, and local social-ecological insights, we provide donors, developers, investors, land managers and governments across the region, with the definitive, audit-ready proof needed to secure and sustain your land-use investments.
:::

::: {.eg-hero-ctas}
[View services](#services){.eg-btn .eg-btn-solid} [Start a project](#contact){.eg-btn .eg-btn-outline}
:::

:::
:::

::: {#services .eg-section .eg-services}
::: {.eg-wrap}
::: {.eg-sec-head}
[Services]{.eg-eyebrow}

## Five layers of analysis, stacked around one landscape.

Each service reads like a layer in a GIS project — independently useful, and stronger together. Pick one, or let us build the full stack for a project.
:::

::: {.eg-layer-stack}

::: {.eg-layer}
::: {.eg-layer-marker}
[ ]{.eg-layer-toggle .eg-l1}

[LAYER 01]{.eg-layer-index}
:::

::: {.eg-layer-body}
::: {.eg-layer-main}
### Digital MRV & Carbon Verification

[High-integrity, audit-ready carbon intelligence that you can bank on.]{.eg-layer-one-liner .eg-l1}

::: {.eg-layer-desc}
We provide independent, satellite-grounded measurement-reporting-verification (MRV) pipelines designed to meet the strictest registry standards. By integrating precise biomass estimation, automated land-cover change detection, and longitudinal monitoring, we create a transparent data trail that transforms project performance into reliable, investable assets.

Whether you are developing a new project or vetting a portfolio, our rigorous verification ensures your credits withstand third-party scrutiny and satisfy the most demanding due diligence.

:::

::: {.eg-layer-meta}
[Who it's for]{.eg-tag-label}

[Project developers]{.eg-chip} [Conservancies]{.eg-chip} [Impact investors]{.eg-chip}

::: {.eg-layer-coord}
02°10'S 38°04'E\
Illustrative anchor: Tsavo–Kasigau region
::: {.eg-hero-ctas}
[Learn more](projects.qmd#case_studies){.eg-btn .eg-btn-outline}
:::
:::
:::
:::

::: {.eg-layer-image}
![](images/DataCleaning.png)
:::
:::
:::

::: {.eg-layer}
::: {.eg-layer-marker}
[ ]{.eg-layer-toggle .eg-l2}

[LAYER 02]{.eg-layer-index}
:::

::: {.eg-layer-body}
::: {.eg-layer-main}
### Land-Use & Land-Cover Change Modeling

[Co-designing the future of your landscape.]{.eg-layer-one-liner .eg-l2}

::: {.eg-layer-desc}
Static maps don't capture the pulse of a changing region. We provide dynamic, community-guided scenario modeling that integrates local values and future needs into every projection. From mitigating agricultural sprawl to managing urban growth, we help you build land-use strategies that align conservation goals with sustainable community development. 

Our approaches are precision-engineered for spatial planning, regulatory compliance, and high-impact donor reporting. 

:::

::: {.eg-layer-meta}
[Who it's for]{.eg-tag-label}

[County governments]{.eg-chip} [Land-use planners]{.eg-chip} [Conservation NGOs]{.eg-chip}

::: {.eg-layer-coord}
00°49'S 35°42'E\
Illustrative anchor: Mau Forest Complex
:::
:::
:::

::: {.eg-layer-image}
![Aerial view of forest edge and farmland near the Mau Forest Complex](images/DataCleaning.png)
:::
:::
:::

::: {.eg-layer}
::: {.eg-layer-marker}
[ ]{.eg-layer-toggle .eg-l3}

[LAYER 03]{.eg-layer-index}
:::

::: {.eg-layer-body}
::: {.eg-layer-main}
### Landscape Connectivity & Conservation Planning

[Bridging the gap between ecological integrity and human prosperity.]{.eg-layer-one-liner .eg-l3}

::: {.eg-layer-desc}
We specialize in mapping and modeling the complexities of fragmented landscapes to create actionable conservation strategies. Our work goes beyond static mapping, utilizing cutting-edge simulation to show where conservation investments and community-led agreements will actually hold, not just where a map says they should.  

Our Core Focus Areas:

- Connectivity & corridor design
- Proactive human-wildlife conflict modeling
- Integrated well-being assessments
- Effectiveness & impact analysis

:::

::: {.eg-layer-meta}
[Who it's for]{.eg-tag-label}

[Wildlife conservancies]{.eg-chip} [Park authorities]{.eg-chip} [Conservation NGOs]{.eg-chip}

::: {.eg-layer-coord}
00°02'N 37°33'E\
Illustrative anchor: Northern Rangelands
:::
:::
:::

::: {.eg-layer-image}
![Wildlife corridor landscape in Kenya's Northern Rangelands](images/DataCleaning.png)
:::
:::
:::

::: {.eg-layer}
::: {.eg-layer-marker}
[ ]{.eg-layer-toggle .eg-l4}

[LAYER 04]{.eg-layer-index}
:::

::: {.eg-layer-body}
::: {.eg-layer-main}
### Social-Ecological Systems & Resilience Assessment

[Where land, climate, and community governance converge.]{.eg-layer-one-liner .eg-l4}

::: {.eg-layer-desc}
Effective conservation requires more than satellite imagery; it requires understanding the governance systems that sustain the land. We pair spatial data with social science to model resilience, assess land governance, and evaluate community-based natural resource management. 

By projecting the impacts of interventions before they occur and auditing their performance after implementation, we provide the integrated intelligence necessary to turn conservation goals into lasting, on-the-ground resilience.

Our specialized assessments include:

- Landscape & regenerative planning
- Restoration & intervention analysis
- Climate adaptation
:::

::: {.eg-layer-meta}
[Who it's for]{.eg-tag-label}

[Research consortia]{.eg-chip} [Bilateral donors]{.eg-chip} [Conservancy associations]{.eg-chip}

::: {.eg-layer-coord}
03°04'S 37°21'E\
Illustrative anchor: Kilimanjaro socio-ecological zone
:::
:::
:::

::: {.eg-layer-image}
![Community grazing land near Kilimanjaro's socio-ecological zone](images/DataCleaning.png)
:::
:::
:::

::: {.eg-layer}
::: {.eg-layer-marker}
[ ]{.eg-layer-toggle .eg-l5}

[LAYER 05]{.eg-layer-index}
:::

::: {.eg-layer-body}
::: {.eg-layer-main}
### Technical Consulting & Capacity Building

[Translating complex spatial data into actionable, team-led expertise.]{.eg-layer-one-liner .eg-l5}

::: {.eg-layer-desc}
We provide the analytical heavy lifting, from advanced statistical modeling to custom R and Python workflows, so your team can move faster and smarter. More than just a service provider, we build internal capacity through hands-on workshops and deep-dive consulting, empowering your staff to manage complex environmental challenges long after our engagement ends.
:::

::: {.eg-layer-meta}
[Who it's for]{.eg-tag-label}

[Conservation NGOs and non-Profits]{.eg-chip} [Government environmental agencies]{.eg-chip} [Carbon and biodiversity project developers]{.eg-chip}

::: {.eg-layer-coord}
02°17'N 37°59'E\
Illustrative anchor: Advanced GIS for conservation practitioners
:::
:::
:::

::: {.eg-layer-image}
![Dry rangeland landscape near Marsabit, Northern Kenya](images/DataCleaning.png)
:::
:::
:::

:::
:::
:::





::: {#approach .eg-section}
::: {.eg-wrap}
::: {.eg-sec-head}
[Our approach]{.eg-eyebrow}

## The Foundation of Integrity

[Every service we provide is anchored in three non-negotiable technical pillars:]{.eg-layer-one-liner .eg-l5}
:::

::: {.eg-approach-grid .eg-approach-cards}
::: {.eg-approach-item}
::: {.eg-approach-head}
[A]{.eg-approach-badge}

### Field-Grounded Data Fusion
:::

We go beyond remote sensing pixels by integrating high-fidelity ground truth data including field plots, transects, and bioacoustic monitoring to calibrate our models. This multi-source data fusion ensures our spatial projections reflect actual on-the-ground ecological conditions.
:::

::: {.eg-approach-item}
::: {.eg-approach-head}
[B]{.eg-approach-badge}

### Community-Informed Social-Ecological Modeling
:::

We integrate social science with spatial analysis to capture the human dimensions of land management. By embedding local governance frameworks and communal knowledge directly into our modeling engines (e.g., Agent-Based Models), we ensure our assessments are socially sustainable and operationally viable.
:::

::: {.eg-approach-item}
::: {.eg-approach-head}
[C]{.eg-approach-badge}

### Registry-Ready Reproducibility
:::

Our workflows are built for auditability. We utilize open-science standards to ensure every output meets the strict requirements of carbon registries and institutional auditors. By prioritizing documentation and transparency from the start, we eliminate the need for costly rework during final verification.
:::
:::
:::
:::




::: {#sectors .eg-section .eg-sectors}
::: {.eg-wrap}
::: {.eg-sec-head}
[Sectors]{.eg-eyebrow}

## Who we build these layers for
:::

[Carbon & Conservation Finance]{.eg-sector-chip} [Government & County Planning]{.eg-sector-chip} [Multilaterals & Bilateral Donors]{.eg-sector-chip} [Research Institutions]{.eg-sector-chip} [Agriculture & Insurance]{.eg-sector-chip}
:::
:::

::: {#contact .eg-section .eg-contact}
::: {.eg-contact-wrap}
::: {.eg-contact-left}
## Have a landscape that needs a closer look?

Tell us what you're trying to prove, protect, or plan for. We'll tell you which layers apply.
:::

::: {.eg-contact-box}
[EMAIL]{.eg-mono-label}

[hello@equatorgeospatial.com](mailto:hello@equatorgeospatial.com){.eg-email}

[BASED IN]{.eg-mono-label}

[Nairobi, Kenya — serving East Africa]{.eg-email-sub}

[Send us a brief](mailto:hello@equatorgeospatial.com){.eg-btn .eg-btn-solid}
:::
:::
:::


:::
